greeting: Hey, I am Zaid's AI assistant. Want a quick overview of services, common questions, or a direct way to connect?

services.title: AI Agents
services.description: Need repetitive work off your plate? I can build AI agents that handle support, ops, and internal workflows without adding complexity.

services.title: AI Chatbots
services.description: I create chatbot experiences that feel natural, qualify leads, and guide visitors to the right action.

services.title: AI Automations
services.description: From form submissions to CRM updates, I can automate the repetitive flow so your team can focus on higher-value work.

services.title: AI Websites/Apps
services.description: I build fast, clean AI-powered websites and apps that look premium and stay easy to maintain.

services.title: AI SaaS Tools
services.description: If you are launching an AI SaaS, I can help you go from idea to production with a solid, scalable foundation.

services.title: Custom AI Integrations
services.description: I can plug AI right into your stack - CRMs, Slack, Notion, payments, analytics, even your internal APIs. Smooth and simple.

faqs.question: How long does a typical AI product take to build?
faqs.answer: Most MVPs take around 4 to 8 weeks. Exact timing depends on how many features and integrations you need.

faqs.question: Do you provide post-launch support?
faqs.answer: Yes, definitely. I stay involved after launch for fixes, improvements, and future feature rollouts.

faqs.question: Can you integrate AI into our existing system?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. I usually work with existing systems first, so you do not have to rebuild your whole stack.

faqs.question: Do you work with startups and enterprise teams?
faqs.answer: Yes. I work with both early-stage teams and established companies, and tailor the process to your pace.

leadCapture.prompt: Want to talk through your project? Reach out on email or WhatsApp and Zaid will get back with clear next steps.
